seoTitle: East Wardell vs Eastgardens — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between East Wardell and Eastgardens. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: East Wardell vs Eastgardens: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in East Wardell and Eastgardens.
heading: East Wardell vs Eastgardens — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between East Wardell, New South Wales and Eastgardens, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Wardell has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Eastgardens (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is East Wardell or Eastgardens safer from flooding?
faq.answer: East Wardell has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Eastgardens scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: East Wardell scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Eastgardens scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in East Wardell or Eastgardens?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Wardell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
